pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect frequency domain assignment bit width in TC-RNTI DCI extraction

### Summary
The `extract_00_tc_rnti` function was using a static bit width value (`frequency_domain_assignment.nbits`) when parsing the frequency domain assignment field from DCI 0_0 messages with TC-RNTI or MSGB-RNTI. This caused incorrect resource block allocation that violated scheduling constraints downstream, as the bit width should vary dynamically based on the actual number of resource blocks (N_RB) c
